templatesCarousel.description: See how we use OpenCreator to make stunning content. Customize them your way and bring your ideas to life with all the latest AI models.

0.question: What can I do if I run out of credits?
0.answer: If you exceed your credit limit, you have a few options: upgrade to a higher-tier plan with more credits, purchase additional credits to supplement your current plan, or use your monthly free credits, which refresh automatically every month.

1.question: What happens when I upgrade my plan?
1.answer: When you upgrade, all benefits and credits from your new plan are unlocked immediately. Any unused credits from your previous plan will be prorated and automatically applied toward your next payment.

2.question: How can I get more credits?
2.answer: Additional credits can be purchased through the Buy More Credits page (available to all users on Creator or higher plans). These credits act as a backup and activate only when your plan's monthly allocation is used up.

3.question: Can I change my subscription plan?
3.answer: Yes. Both Monthly and Yearly users can update their subscription plan anytime. Yearly plans are eligible for prorated refunds based on remaining credits.

4.question: Can unused credits roll over to next month?
4.answer: No, credits reset at the start of each billing cycle. Any unused credits from the previous month won't carry over, ensuring every user begins each month with a full allocation.

5.question: What is the refund policy?
5.answer: Yearly plan subscribers are eligible for a 100% no-questions-asked refund. Please email support@opencreator.io with your account email and order details.

6.question: Where is user data stored?
6.answer: User data is securely stored in US data centers that comply with the highest standards of security and privacy. We are committed to protecting your information and ensuring that it is handled with the utmost care.

7.question: Who should I contact if I have a question?
7.answer: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to reach out at support@opencreator.io. To learn more about OpenCreator, visit our Discord community for comprehensive guides, fun content, FAQs, and resources to enhance your experience.

affiliateHero.title: OpenCreator Affiliate Program
affiliateHero.subtitle: Earn Up to <highlight>40%</highlight> Commission
affiliateHero.description: Monetize your network while sharing cutting-edge AI creation paradigms and the emergence of a new creative flow.

0.title: Apply to join the affiliate program
0.description: Apply to join the affiliate program  once approved, you'll get your own confirmation and become an OpenCreator affiliate.

1.title: Share your unique link
1.description: Share your unique link in any way you like  people click to follow content, and track every click and referral in your Rewardful dashboard.

2.title: Earn recurring commission
2.description: Earn up to 40% recurring commission for each qualifying purchase.

0.question: How do I apply?
0.answer: Simply fill out the affiliate application form.

2.question: How much can I earn?
2.answer: Your earnings depend on how many creators you refer. You'll earn 20% commission for 1-3 referrals, 30% for 4-10 referrals, and 40% once you refer 11 or more creators.

3.question: Is there a limit on earnings?
3.answer: No, there's no cap  your earning potential is unlimited.

4.question: What is the minimum payout threshold?

5.question: How are commissions tracked?
5.answer: All referrals are tracked through your unique affiliate link. You can monitor clicks, conversions, and commissions in real time via your Rewardful dashboard.

6.question: What types of content can I use for promotion?
6.answer: You can use any type of content that fits your audience: videos, blog posts, social media updates, newsletters, placements, and more. Be creative and choose the formats that engage your community best.

7.question: Can I promote my affiliate link with paid advertising?
7.answer: No. Paid advertising is not allowed for affiliate links. This includes ads on search engines, social media platforms, or similar channels. This policy helps avoid conflicts with OpenCreator's own marketing efforts. Any misuse or attempt to game the system may result in termination of your account and forfeiture of commissions.

8.question: What extra benefits do I get after subscribing?
8.answer: You'll get early access to new model integrations, exclusive features, premium templates, and special discounts.

9.question: Can my team share one account?
9.answer: We recommend each member have their own login. Team and enterprise plans include shared workspaces and member management for better security and collaboration.

10.question: Can I promote OpenCreator on multiple platforms?
10.answer: Yes! You can share your affiliate link across any platform that aligns with our affiliate terms.

11.question: Is there support for affiliates?
11.answer: Absolutely. We provide resources and dedicated support to help you succeed. Feel free to reach out to our team anytime via support@opencreator.io
